calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Feb-26-2002 Vacated

MANDATORY SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Feb-26-2002 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: Settlement Conference. Dept. 210. Judge: Thomas J. Mellon, Jr.; Clerks: Dan MacDuff and Diane Carter; Reporter: June Leathley. APPEARANCES: Plaintiff by Frances Burks, with counsel, Arnold Evje; defendant in pro per. The case is settled on the record pursuant to the following oral stipulation: Pltf. to have a stipulation for entry of judgment for the restitution of the premise located at 1234 McAllister Apt. 4L for forfeiture of the lease agreement and for a money judgment in the amount of $1,020.00. Judgment shall not be entered and defendant Jeanie Graves shall remain in possession of the premise provided she pays the sum of $416.00 by 3/5/02 by the close of the business day. Further, the sum of $604.00 shall be paid in installments of $50.00 per month beginning 3/02 and for the next consecutive eleven months along with monthly rent of $206.00. If defendant pays all payments, this action shall be dismissed with prejudice. Should defendant default on any condition, plaintiff's upon twenty-four hours notice to defendant shall apply ex-parte to the court for judgment for restitution, forfeiture of the lease and the unpaid balances then due and owing. There is a general release of all claims and causes of action arising out the tenancy herein and a section 1542 waiver. Each side shall bear its own cost and attorney fees.

MANDATORY SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Feb-26-2002 Continued To Feb-26-02 At 02:30 P.M. In Dept 210
